Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Kerian]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 20''' — Kerian is a Heartlander woman with a long white scar down the center of her face.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 20''' — Kerian is a Chronicler who conducts business with Calder Marten.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 20''' — Kerian has a scar on her forehead.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 1''' — Kerian is a Consultant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 2''' — Kerian is an assassin who does not see murder as the solution to every problem.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 3''' — Kerian is the Guild Representative for a local chapter house of the Consultant’s Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 3''' — Kerian wears a leather satchel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Kerian is a character who participates in the conversation with Shera and Yala.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 5''' — Kerian is a former student of Zhen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 5''' — Kerian reads a book titled 'The Adventures of Lady Clearlove'.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 5''' — Kerian wrapped bandages around the prisoner's ribs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — Kerian wanted Shera to kill Clayborn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — Kerian is a character who prepares waterproof pouches and essential items for Shera.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 7''' — Kerian stated that the Garden has existed since the dawn of the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 7''' — Kerian is a character mentioned by Lucan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 7''' — Kerian is a trained Gardener and a born Imperial Guard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 13''' — Kerian is a High Councilor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 13''' — Kerian carries a set of shears.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — Kerian is a Consultant wearing purple who carries shears.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 19''' — Kerian guided Shera out of a maze.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 21''' — Kerian is a Heartlander wearing a purple dress who uses a Gardener’s shear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 21''' — Kerian observed the destruction of the forest and the Children lunging in the trees.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 2''' — Kerian is an older Gardener and is considered exceptional.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 2''' — Kerian collapsed the Bastion's Veil during a battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 3''' — Kerian is the head of the Gardeners.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 12''' — Kerian is a retired Gardener and a member of the Council of Architects.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 17''' — Kerian has an injury.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 19''' — Kerian expected the enemy to stall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 21''' — Kerian is a Gardener.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 21''' — Kerian is a person who was carried by a river towards the Spear of Tharlos.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — Kerian is a dark-skinned Heartlander woman and the High Gardener, leader of the Consultant assassins.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — Kerian wore black without a shroud over his face.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 7''' — Lucan retrieved Architect Council meeting minutes with Kerian's permission.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 9''' — Kerian worshiped the Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 19''' — Kerian's hair is similar to Loreli's.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 21''' — Kerian responded easily to Estyr.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 21''' — Kerian physically dragged Yala off.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 24''' — Kerian is a Gardener whose shears have grown broader and shine deep blue.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Kerian cautioned Shera about entering a contract with someone untrustworthy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 26''' — Kerian is a person Shera considers wasting.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
